_doc.purpose: Localization companion for campaign.json. Holds en-us entries for the 'Home Security Guard' (自宅警备员, NEET/shut-in joke) campaign start option.
_doc.note: campaign_jitaku_keibiin_start_default_tooltip and campaign_jitaku_keibiin_tooltip are literally 'debug debug' / 'debug' in the zh-cn source (placeholder text, not yet written) - kept verbatim rather than invented.
